meta.name: Luxe Jewelry
meta.description: A refined, editorial e-commerce design for a premium jewelry brand. It features large, high-quality photography, clean typography mixing sans-serif and monospace fonts, and a minimalist black-and-white color palette with subtle off-white backgrounds.

fonts.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Open Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
fonts.display: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Open Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace
fonts.serif: Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

header.notes: Header is solid black with white text. Logo is on the far left, navigation links follow next to it. Far right contains location, search, account, favorites, and cart icons.

footer.notes: Comprehensive footer with multiple columns for links (Help, Stores & Services, Resources, About), a section for certification logos, and a right column highlighting a specific store location with an image and address details. Bottom section includes a 'Become a member' CTA and a sub-footer (black bg) with language/currency selector, legal links, and social icons.

productCard.notes: Minimal product cards with light grey/off-white backgrounds. A small square button with a '+' icon is placed in the bottom center/right of the image area. Thin borders separate the cards in the grid. Below the image: title, type, and price.

productGrid.notes: Cards are flush against each other with a 1px border acting as a grid separator. A 'NEW' badge appears in the top right of some cards.

featuredProducts.label: We think you'll love these
featuredProducts.heading: PICKED JUST FOR YOU
featuredProducts.notes: Carousel layout with arrow navigation on the top right. 4 items visible at a time.

sections.name: announcement-bar
sections.layout: Full width, centered text, side navigation arrows

content.headline: Service announcement
content.specialElements: Navigation arrows on the left side to cycle announcements

sections.notes: Sits at the very top of the page above the header.

sections.name: header
sections.layout: Flexbox row, logo left, nav left-center, actions right
sections.notes: Navigation text is slightly smaller/lighter weight than logo.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full-bleed image, text overlay bottom left

design.text: Dark foreground, large sans-serif heading, monospace body
design.styling: No borders, text sits directly on image background

content.headline: Campaign title focusing on layered jewelry
content.body: Short sentence describing the collection's purpose
content.cta: Single text link with solid underline

media.description: Close-up arrangement of various gold rings with colorful gemstones on a textured off-white background

sections.name: split-feature

design.background: Images act as background for each column
design.text: Dark text, placed bottom left within each image block
design.styling: No gap between columns, full bleed to edges

media.description: Left: Stacked gold and gemstone rings. Right: Hanging gold and gemstone necklaces on green beaded chains

sections.notes: Acts as a secondary hero highlighting specific collections.

sections.name: product-carousel
sections.layout: Header top left, nav arrows top right, 4-column product grid below

design.background: White page background, off-white card backgrounds

content.headline: Curated selection heading
content.cta: Plus icon buttons inside product cards

media.description: Individual gold jewelry pieces on plain off-white backgrounds

content.specialElements: Square navigation buttons (prev/next) aligned to the right of the section header.

sections.notes: Clean grid with borders creating a structured look.

design.text: Black text, monospace subtitle and body
design.styling: Images top, text below, generous spacing

content.headline: Physical locations and services
content.cta: Text links with solid underlines beneath descriptions

media.description: Left: Bright, modern store interior. Center: Piercing studio setup. Right: Close up of a stacked ring.

sections.name: sustainability-banner
sections.layout: Flexbox row, text left, description right

content.headline: Sustainability initiatives
content.body: Paragraph explaining brand journey and commitments

sections.notes: Breaks up the white space with a solid color block.

sections.name: footer
sections.layout: Multi-section: main nav columns, membership sign up, sub-footer bottom

design.background: Off-white/light grey main area, black sub-footer
design.text: Black text main area, white text sub-footer. Small sans-serif and monospace.
design.styling: Dividers separating sections, dense information layout

content.headline: Membership call to action
content.cta: Outlined button for sign up with square corners
content.specialElements: Array of certification/partnership logos in a grid.

sections.notes: A floating chat bubble icon is visible in the bottom right corner over the footer.
